_comment: Sanitized template showing the shape of solo-os-config.json. Onboarding writes the real file for you — you do not normally edit this by hand. No real IDs, emails, or paths here; this is the version that ships in the repo.

_engagements_example._note: Optional. Add an entry per engagement. Include a weekly_email block to have the Monday planner draft that engagement's weekly email — see skills/monday-planner/references/weekly-email.md. Keep the real 'engagements' list below; this _example key is ignored.
_engagements_example.name: Example Client ERP Migration
